items.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
items.description: Salesforce on Tuesday launched an entirely rebuilt version of Slackbot, the company s workplace assistant, transforming it from a simple notification tool into what executives describe as a fully powered AI agent capable of searching enterprise data,

items.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required

items.title: Nous Research's NousCoder-14B is an open-source coding model landing right in the Claude Code moment

items.title: The creator of Claude Code just revealed his workflow, and developers are losing their minds

items.title: Amazon hits sellers with ‘fuel surcharge’ as Iran war roils global energy markets
items.description: The e-commerce giant called the surcharge "temporary" but couldn't give a date for when the policy would be retired.

items.title: Telehealth giant Hims & Hers says its customer support system was hacked
items.description: The U.S. telehealth giant says hackers stole customer support ticket data over the course of several days in February.

items.title: Artemis II is NASA’s last moon mission without Silicon Valley
items.description: Next time around, the pressure will be on SpaceX and Blue Origin.

items.title: Gateway Capital announces first close of $25M Fund II
items.description: Gateway Capital, the Milwaukee-based venture firm founded by Dana Guthrie, can now begin investment operations for its $25M Fund II.

items.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
items.description: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.

items.title: Flipboard’s new ‘social websites’ help publishers and creators tap into the open social web
items.description: Flipboard's social websites consolidate profiles and posts from Bluesky, Mastodon, Threads, YouTube, podcasts, blogs, and RSS feeds into a single, shared destination.

items.title: ElevenLabs releases a new AI-powered music-generation app
items.description: ElevenMusic lets users create and remix songs using text prompts. The new app suggests ElevenLabs wants to be more than just a voice model company.

items.title: NASA astronauts prove that sending an email really is rocket science
items.description: NASA Artemis II commander Reid Wiseman faced the most earthly possible conflict while in outer space: his Outlook wasn't working.

items.title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models
items.description: MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.

items.title: Money transfer app Duc exposed thousands of driver’s licenses and passports to the open web
items.description: An exposed Amazon-hosted server allowed anyone to access reams of customer data without needing a password.

items.title: Google now lets you direct avatars through prompts in its Vids app
items.description: Google is adding a way to customize and instruct avatars for video creation in the Vids app.

items.title: ICE says it bought Paragon’s spyware to use in drug trafficking cases
items.description: The acting director of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement told lawmakers that the use of Paragon spyware is necessary to counter terrorists’ “thriving exploitation of encrypted communications platforms.”

items.title: United’s mobile app now shows TSA wait times at select airports
items.description: The TSA wait times feature is one of many new additions to the United app, including automatic rebooking assistance and real-time time weather radar maps.

items.title: Tesla’s cheaper vehicles aren’t helping its declining sales
items.description: The company's deliveries in the first quarter were just 6% higher than last year, and Tesla now faces a third straight year of falling sales.

items.title: Commonwealth Fusion Systems leans on magnets for near-term revenue
items.description: Realta Fusion is buying magnets from Commonwealth Fusion Systems, providing a revenue stopgap.
